summary: Completed frontend testing of German inclusive dating platform. Core features working: register page with gender dropdown, login/discover with QuickFilterBar, MyProfile with readonly age and photo counter. Several Account and Admin page features missing or not properly implemented.

ui_bugs.issue: Account page redirects to registration form instead of showing account settings
ID-Verification, Travel, and Premium sections not found with expected data-testids
Admin tabs visible but missing expected data-testids for Verifizierungen, KI-Konfig, Zahlungen
Photo upload input not found for testing upload slot hiding at 5/5 photos

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'Konto' link shows registration form instead of account settings

passed_tests: Register page: gender dropdown present and required with German options
Register page: German age hint 'Alter kann später nicht mehr geändert werden.' displayed
Discover page: QuickFilterBar visible with all 4 chips (online_only, only_verified, only_face_photo, only_with_photos)
MyProfile page: age input disabled/readonly with correct data-testid
MyProfile page: photo counter shows '5 / 5' correctly
Admin page accessible with admin@eros.app credentials
Admin page shows German tabs: Verifizierungen, KI-Konfig, Zahlungen
All user-facing text in German as required
No console errors found (only React DevTools info message)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Account page routing issue - clicking 'Konto' should show account settings, not registration form. Add missing data-testids for Account page sections (id-verification-section, travel-section, premium-section) and Admin tabs (admin-tab-verifications, admin-tab-ai, admin-tab-payments). Implement proper Account page with ID verification (free), Travel planner, and Premium sections as specified.
